task: Compare the first and second most popular smartphones manufactured by Xiaomi and show the comparison chart.
final_result_response:
## ✅ Xiaomi Smartphone Comparison — Completed on versus.com!

I navigated to https://versus.com/en, filtered smartphones by the **Xiaomi** brand (sorted by Versus Score), identified the **top 2 most popular** Xiaomi phones, added them both to the comparison tool, and the full comparison chart was displayed at:
🔗 **https://versus.com/en/xiaomi-15-vs-xiaomi-15-ultra**

---

### 📱 #1 Most Popular: Xiaomi 15 Ultra — 100 pts (🏆 WINNER)
### 📱 #2 Most Popular: Xiaomi 15 — 93 pts

---

### 📊 Side-by-Side Comparison Chart

| Feature | Xiaomi 15 | Xiaomi 15 Ultra |
|---|---|---|
| **Versus Score** | 93 pts | ⭐ **100 pts (Winner)** |
| **Price** | ~$808 | ~$281 |
| **Screen Size** | 6.36" | **6.73"** (+5.82%) |
| **Resolution** | 1200 × 2670 px | **1440 × 3200 px** (+43.82%) |
| **Pixel Density** | 460 ppi | **522 ppi** (+13.48%) |
| **RAM** | 16 GB | 16 GB |
| **Battery** | 5240 mAh | **6000 mAh** (+14.5%) |
| **Main Camera** | 50 MP | **200+50+50+50 MP** (2.33×) |
| **Optical Zoom** | 2.6× | **4.3×** (1.7×) |
| **Bluetooth** | Standard | **Newer version** |
| **Ultra Power Saving** | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Weight** | ✅ **192g** (37g lighter) | 229g |
| **Thickness** | ✅ **8.5mm** | 9.4mm |
| **Body Volume** | ✅ **19.27% smaller** | Larger |
| **SIM Support** | ✅ **2 SIM + 2 eSIM** | 2 SIM only |

---

### 🏅 Verdict
The **Xiaomi 15 Ultra** is the overall winner with a perfect **100-point** Versus score, excelling in display quality, camera system (200MP main + 3 additional 50MP lenses), battery life, and screen resolution. The **Xiaomi 15** wins on portability — it is 37g lighter, 0.9mm thinner, 19.27% smaller in body volume, and supports dual eSIM — making it the better choice for users who prioritize a compact, lightweight device.

Screenshots of the comparison page were saved to:
- `comparison_chart.png` (top of page)
- `xiaomi_comparison_top.png`
- `xiaomi_comparison_chart.png`

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user wanted the agent to find the two most popular Xiaomi smartphones on versus.com and display a comparison chart between them.

**Output Assessment:** The agent navigated to versus.com, filtered smartphones by Xiaomi brand (sorted by Versus Score), identified Xiaomi 15 Ultra (100 pts, #1) and Xiaomi 15 (93 pts, #2) as the top two, added both to the comparison tool, navigated to the full comparison page at https://versus.com/en/xiaomi-15-vs-xiaomi-15-ultra, and presented a detailed comparison chart with specs including display, camera, battery, weight, connectivity, and more.

**Evidence:** Step 7 confirms the agent saw the filtered Xiaomi list with Xiaomi 15 Ultra at #1 (100 pts) and Xiaomi 15 at #2 (93 pts). Steps 10-13 confirm both phones were added to the comparison bar and the Compare button was clicked. Steps 14 and 32 confirm the full comparison page loaded at versus.com showing the detailed side-by-side spec comparison, winner badge on Xiaomi 15 Ultra, and all the percentage-advantage bars. The execution integrity is "healthy" with meaningful browser interaction confirmed. The final response accurately reflects what the agent saw on the comparison page.

**Summary:** The agent successfully completed all required steps: filtered versus.com by Xiaomi brand, identified the top 2 most popular phones (Xiaomi 15 Ultra and Xiaomi 15), created a comparison on the site, and displayed a comprehensive comparison chart with verified data from the actual page.
